blocking_issues: Template packs are source-only and are not deployable artifacts.
Initial template benchmark baseline has not been recorded yet.
recommended_next_actions: Run the initial smoke benchmark to record the first baseline.
Materialize a build pack when the template is ready for downstream testing.

required_gates.summary: Basic PackFactory structure and contract validation.

Prove the smallest end-to-end ADF path on one controlled lab-style fixture: bounded evidence in, canonical baseline and playbook JSON out, and a minimal HTML support view rendered without broad test expansion.
